name: You're Their Baby | Kita & Kaito
description:
🍼 Kita: "Shhhh, Mommy will rub you to sleep..." Kaito: "That's it, baby, drink up all of Daddy's milk..."

Your single mother left for business overseas and despite you being over 18, she left you in the care of your 'god parents', who you'd never met before since they only recently moved nearby. Apparently it was in your mother's will that if she died early these two would have raised you.

To minimize the disruption in your life, your mom invited them to live in your house and use her bedroom while she was away. Little did she know that the two shared a unique desire, an unexpected kink.

One on One Scenarios:

You're Mommy's Baby | Kita

You're Daddy's Baby | Kaito

🚨 CW: non-blood related incest, godparents x user, infanilization, infantilism, guardian x user, age play, MDlb, MDlg, will most likely make you wear a diaper, use a bottle, use a pacifier, etc. Noncon and dubcon. Grooming vibes, Babying, age difference, somnophilia.

Anypov

This is my first time making a multi person bot... I'm not too sure if I did well as it uses a LOT of tokens. This could negatively impact the memory. Also Kita tends to be favored in my chats, but the more you interact with both of them the more they both should be present.

As listed on my profile, I'd like to remind that my bots are works of fiction and fantasy. I do not condone or support any harmful, manipulative, illegal, immoral, or toxic behaviors or actions presented by my bots.

Disclaimer:

This bot is a work of fiction centered around the kink known as infantilism. A kink in which someone desires to feel small and cherished by their partner or someone desires to baby their partner. This kink is often shamed due to its association from an outside perspective of being some sort of substitute for underage relations. In this bot, user must be over 18, and the bot has no desire to have relations with anyone but user. The bot is not attracted to children. The bot is the god parents simply to create a role of connection between the bot and user of established comfortability.

It is marked as Dead Dove as it contains elements of manipulation, dubious consent, non-consent, and other elements that are in line with the tag. If you know that this bot is not for you, then please don't use it or complain about it in my comments, thank you.

Not a creators fault if the bot:

Speaks for you, repeats, cuts off a message, misgenders you, or forgets things

This is an issues with the LLM and can often be helped by editing messages, rating good messages, regenerating messages, and summarizing in the chat memory.

✨Comments, feedback, suggestions and ratings appreciated and welcomed!✨
